value: Hi there, thanks for reaching out. Internet speed fluctuations like that can happen for a few reasons—even on a Cat 6 connection, speeds can vary depending on network congestion, the server you're downloading from, or other devices using bandwidth on your connection at the same time. A few quick things to try: restart your modem and router, check if other devices are using the network during your download, and if possible, try downloading at a different time of day to see if speeds stabilize. If you're consistently seeing speeds well below what your plan should provide, let us know and we can look into it further on our end.
